_schema: Generation History — localStorage key: aics_pb_history. Each entry is one generated image snapshot. Array capped at 30 entries in the UI (see tools/prompt-builder.html).
_migration: loadHistory() runs migrateHistory() on read. Auto-fixes: missing seed→rng, out-of-range seed→clamp [0,2^32-1], rating axes 5×clamp 0..5, missing lora/negative/favorite/notes→defaults. Writes back if changed.

_fields.id: number — unique per-entry id (Date.now()); used for regen/variant links
_fields.timestamp: number — ms epoch; fallback to id when missing
_fields.sceneTitle: string|null — denormalized scene title for display
_fields.lora: string — lora spec inserted (e.g. ayachi_nene_v11:0.8); default-derived when missing
_fields.version: integer — scene+character version chain; parent_id links prior
_fields.parent_id: number|null — prior version id for same scene+character
